title: Marbella Boat Rental for a Family Day: Costs, Tips & Best Boats in 2026
html:
Planning a family day out on the water in Marbella is straightforward with a boat hire Marbella service from BoatHire24. Depart from Puerto Banús or the Marbella Marina for a half-day trip along the Costa del Sol, with prices starting from around EUR 400 for a small motorboat up to EUR 2,500 for a crewed catamaran. BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Marbella or list your own.

Where to set off in Marbella

Marbella offers several real departure points for a family boating day. Puerto Banús is the most famous marina, with luxury yachts and easy access to the bay. Marbella Marina (Puerto Deportivo de Marbella) is a quieter option closer to the old town. For a more scenic start, consider La Bajadilla fishing port or the nearby Cabopino Marina, which leads to the sand dunes of Artola. From any of these, you can head to the calm waters of the Bay of Marbella or cross to the beaches of San Pedro de Alcántara. The island of Isla de las Palomas off Cabopino is a popular snorkelling spot just four nautical miles from port. One option worth a look is the Sunseeker Predator 72 listing.

Which boat to rent for a family day

Choosing the right boat depends on your group size and budget. The link to the Sunseeker Predator 72 listing gives an example of a premium option. Here are four family-friendly choices:

  1. Rib or speedboat, best for fast trips and water sports, up to 8 guests, from EUR 350 for a half-day.
  2. Motor yacht (e.g. Azimut 58), comfortable cruising with a cabin, up to 10 guests, from EUR 800 for a full day.
  3. Catamaran (e.g. Lagoon 450), stable, with ample deck space, up to 12 guests, from EUR 1,200 for a full day.
  4. Sailboat (e.g. Dufour 460), peaceful and eco-friendly, up to 8 guests, from EUR 500 for a half-day.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Marbella?

Prices vary by boat type, season and trip duration, with a half-day hire starting at EUR 300 for a shared tour. Below is a typical cost breakdown in EUR for 2026:

  • Shared tour on a small motorboat: from EUR 90 per person, half-day.
  • Private small motorboat half-day: from EUR 400 (up to 6 guests).
  • Catamaran full-day: from EUR 1,500 (up to 12 guests, includes crew).
  • Crewed luxury yacht full-day: from EUR 2,500 (up to 10 guests, includes lunch).

Always check the boat hire Marbella page on BoatHire24 for verified listings and current prices, as rates may include extras like fuel or a skipper.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Marbella?

Yes, for bareboat hire of a motor yacht over a certain power you need a Spanish recreational boating licence or an equivalent international certificate. Skippered charters are licence-free and ideal for families. Always confirm exact requirements with the operator, as rules can change. For season, the high-season months are June, July and August, when the Poniente wind often brings calm seas in the morning.

Tip: book a morning trip in July to avoid the afternoon Levante wind, which can create choppy conditions in the Bay of Marbella, but the coast remains sheltered.

At a glance

  • Price band: EUR 300, 2,500 per trip
  • Peak months: June, July, August
  • Trip length: half-day (4 hours) or full-day (8 hours)
  • Capacity: 6, 12 guests typical
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Marbella

Can I rent a boat in Marbella without a licence?

Yes, you can book a skippered charter where a professional captain handles navigation and safety.

What is the best month for a family boating day in Marbella?

June offers warm weather and calm seas, with fewer crowds than July and August.

How many people can a typical family boat hold in Marbella?

Most family-friendly boats accommodate up to 12 guests, with life jackets provided for all ages.

Can we bring our own food and drinks on a boat rental in Marbella?

Many rentals allow you to bring your own supplies, but catered options are also available through the operator.

Whether you choose a rib for exploring coves or a catamaran for a leisurely cruise, arranging your family day on the water is simple with BoatHire24. The marketplace offers verified boats and easy online booking, so you can start planning your 2026 Marbella adventure today. If you own a boat, consider becoming a host on boathire24.com to share your vessel with families seeking memorable days out.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Marbella and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
